creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Stefan Schlosser from comment #2)
Look weird:
"                ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR} "! -regex ^./README.md")"
82 chars length > 80.
"        ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README.md ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}"
65 only.

I would prefer not to touch this part of the Makefile.
